title: Goat Pack
description: Goat Pack: scientifically proven to make your Minecraft experience 99% more goated.
body:
Welcome to **Goat Pack** – the ultimate Fabric modpack for players who want their Minecraft smoother, prettier, and way more goat. This pack combines performance boosts, visual upgrades, and quality-of-life mods that keep the vanilla vibe alive, just… with a lot more cool stuff. Perfect for both solo survivors and chaotic multiplayer sessions.

Includes:
- Optimization mods for buttery-smooth gameplay
- Visual enhancements (because your goat deserves to look good)
- Tweaks and tools to make your life easier, not harder
- 0% nonsense, 100% goat
  

**Warning**: May cause excessive fun, unexpected goat encounters, and an uncontrollable desire to say “baa” in voice chat.
